---
title: DrugBank
alias: &ALIAS drugbank
href: https://go.drugbank.com/
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  include:
    categories: *ALIAS
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

---

## Overview

DrugBank is a comprehensive, freely accessible online database containing detailed drug data along with comprehensive drug target, mechanism of action, pharmacological, and pharmaceutical information.

## Key Features

- Contains detailed records for over 14,000 drugs including small molecules and biologics
- Provides drug-target interaction data, mechanism of action, and pharmacokinetic parameters
- Includes drug interaction, contraindication, and adverse effect information
- Links drugs to pharmacogenomic variants affecting metabolism and efficacy
- Offers structured data download and API access for computational research

## Use Cases in Research

- Cataloging pharmacological properties of antimicrobials for drug repurposing analyses
- Mapping drug-target interactions to inform AMR mechanism investigations
- Identifying pharmacokinetic parameters for PK/PD modeling of antibiotic efficacy
- Building knowledge graphs of drug-drug interactions relevant to infectious disease treatment
- Supporting AI-driven drug discovery by providing curated pharmacology training data

## Getting Started

Visit [DrugBank](https://go.drugbank.com/) to access the database.

## Related Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
